description:
Modern personal portfolio page for a photographer. This is a minimal one page website, with asymmetric layout and typography, providing lots of space to showcase highlight pieces, provide information about yourself and your work, list availability and services and allow people to contact you.
Part of the Photography Collection

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))

Nina Doneli

photography, videography,
editing & post production

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetuer adipiscing elit, sed diam nonummy nibh euismod tincidunt ut laoreet dolore magna aliquam erat volutpat. Ut wisi enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exerci tation ullamcorper suscipit lobortis nisl ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. 

What I like about photographs is that they capture a moment that’s gone forever, impossible to reproduce.

01

Photographing landscapes present a set of challenges. First, I think about the character of the landscape I want to shoot and the feeling I want to convey in my image. Should it feel dark and brooding, or light and airy? Are there any special features that will help express how you feel about it?

People spot a big black lens, and they worry about what they're doing, or how their hair looks. 

02

Based in UK, I travel to the remotest parts of the world following my passion
for exploring and experiencing nature.

03

              “A picture is a secret about
a secret, the more it tells you the less
you know.”
 

My work has been published in prominent magazines like National Geographic, and I've worked with clients like Apple and RedBull. I spend most of his time either in the Lofoten Islands, Norway, or in Tuscany, Italy, guiding groups from Russia, Asia, Europe, and the US.

Editorial & Portrait Shoot
